title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? PropTiger in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!
